criteria.criterionText: Then the command should not flood stdout with full telemetry event bodies
criteria.llmObservationSummary: The stdout of the command was not provided, so it's impossible to verify if it avoids flooding with full telemetry event bodies.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide the actual stdout from the command execution.

criteria.criterionText: And detailed telemetry should be written to an evidence artifact
criteria.llmObservationSummary: The content of the evidence artifact was not provided, so it's impossible to verify if detailed telemetry was written to it.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide the content of the generated evidence artifact.

criteria.criterionText: And stdout should show only the verdict, counts, and actionable top findings.
criteria.llmObservationSummary: The stdout of the command was not provided, so it's impossible to verify if it shows only the verdict, counts, and actionable top findings.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide the actual stdout from the command execution.
